title: Fragment: Zephyrus The Awakener.
content:
Come, thou awakener of the spirit's ocean,
    Zephyr, whom to thy cloud or cave
    No thought can trace! speed with thy gentle motion!
meaning:
"Fragment: Zephyrus The Awakener." is a quintessential example of Percy Bysshe Shelley's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
